buildingDept.hours: Contact Town Hall for current hours

healthDept.name: Siskiyou County Environmental Health Program
healthDept.notes: Required for food facility permits (restaurant TI). Submit concurrently with building permit.

fireAgency.notes: CAL FIRE Siskiyou Unit co-located at 12137 N. Main St. Contact for hood suppression acceptance and large commercial projects.
